source_step: Etape 26 - Netlist B6 complete et solveurs globaux Siemens U273
notes: B6 schematic is closed, but Ts1..Ts6 remain guarded and not stamped as a full active transistor model.
B11 active behaviour remains Thevenin/parametric for the current plugin scaffold.
The offline state-space/DAE engine exists as an unverified component-level reference path.
U1/U2 transformer magnetic modelling is intentionally deferred to a later sprint.
Realtime DSP must not claim full transistor-level equivalence before reference closure and calibration.
